ThreeOilLowCost.name: Three fuel consumption+
ThreeOilLowCost.help: Use a three-fuel low-consumption lineup to fight, and automatically replace the flagship and retire when the flagship reaches level 32.

RaidScuttle.name: Fight together to sink the ship+

Coalition.name: Light and Shadow Fashion-While Shooting in Progress

WarArchives.name: Combat file
WarArchives.help: Due to the lack of maintenance of combat files, the reclamation function may not work properly. If you find that Alas is running abnormally, please complete the reclamation manually and then use the self-disciplined enemy-seeking function.

CoalitionSp.name: Light and shadow style-SP while shooting

Island.name: island plan
Island.help: Requires island level 18 and unlocking the integrated management panel.

Minigame.name: mini games
Minigame.help: Automatically receive game coins when the game coins do not overflow. Automatically play mini-games when there are game coins and the rewards are not full.

OpsiArchive.name: File coordinates
OpsiArchive.help:
Purchase the file coordinates from the White Ticket Shop and run it. The file sea area does not consume action power.
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable the large world reclamation mission or use the campaign information recorder (5000 oil props)

OpsiScheduling.name: Intelligent Scheduling+
OpsiScheduling.help:
The intelligent scheduling function of the big world is used to coordinate the switching between erosion 1 leveling and yellow coin replenishment tasks.
Once enabled, it will automatically switch between different tasks and send push notifications based on gold coins and mobility.

OpsiCrossMonth.name: Every day across the month
OpsiCrossMonth.help:
Alas will enter the big world 10 minutes before the big world cross-month reset, wait for the big world to reset but not exit the big world, and then complete the new day's big world daily, hidden sea, abyssal sea and short cat connection to get extra golden dishes. When running the Big World Daily, run it according to the "Big World Daily" task setting, and the rest are the same.
    Important: Please do not operate the game while Alas is waiting for the month.

OpsiDailyDelay.name: The big world mission is postponed +
OpsiDailyDelay.help: Within the configurable time period before the server restarts at 0:00 every day (the default is 5 minutes, which is triggered at 23:55), the currently ongoing Erosion 1 and Short Cat tasks will be automatically postponed until the restart is completed at 0:00 the next day.

Enable.name: Enable this feature
Enable.help:
Add this task to the scheduler
Commissioning, scientific research, and harvest tasks are mandatory.

NextRun.name: Next run time
NextRun.help: The value is automatically calculated and does not need to be modified manually. Will run immediately after clearing

SuccessInterval.name: After a successful run, postpone the next run for X minutes

FailureInterval.name: After a run fails, postpone the next run for X minutes

ServerUpdate.name: Server refresh time
ServerUpdate.help:
After some tasks run successfully, the next run will be postponed until the server refresh time
Automatically converts time zones, generally no modification is required

Serial.name: Emulator Serial
Serial.help:
Common simulator Serial can be found in the list below
Fill in "auto" to automatically detect the simulator. "auto" cannot be used when multiple simulators are running or an simulator that does not support automatic detection is used and must be filled in manually.

Emulator default Serial:
- Bluestack Simulator 127.0.0.1:5555
- Bluestacks Simulator 4 Hyper-v version, fill in "bluestacks4-hyperv" to automatically connect, fill in "bluestacks4-hyperv-2" for more options, and so on.
- For Bluestacks Simulator 5 Hyper-v version, fill in "bluestacks5-hyperv" to automatically connect, fill in "bluestacks5-hyperv-1" for more options, and so on.
- Night God Simulator 127.0.0.1:62001
- Night God Simulator 64-bit 127.0.0.1:59865
- MuMu Emulator/MuMu EmulatorX 127.0.0.1:7555
- MuMu Emulator 12 127.0.0.1:16384
- MuMu Pro (macOS) 127.0.0.1:16384, the order of opening is 127.0.0.1:16416, 127.0.0.1:16448...
- MEmu 127.0.0.1:21503
- Lightning emulator emulator-5554 or 127.0.0.1:5555
If you use the multi-open function of the simulator, their Serial will not be the default. You can execute `adb devices` query in console.bat, or fill it in according to the official tutorial of the simulator.

PackageName.name: game server
PackageName.help: When multiple game clients are installed on the emulator, you need to manually select the server

ServerName.name: In-game server
ServerName.help:
Select the server where the game is located to enable server status detection
Suspend until resumed during server maintenance or network unavailability

ScreenshotMethod.name: Simulator screenshot solution
ScreenshotMethod.help:
When using automatic selection, a performance test will be performed and automatically changed to the fastest screenshot scheme
Speed under normal circumstances: DroidCast_raw >> aScreenCap_nc > ADB_nc >>> aScreenCap > uiautomator2 ~= ADB
Run Tools - Performance Test to find the fastest solution

ControlMethod.name: Simulator control scheme
ControlMethod.help:
Speed: minitouch > Hermit >>> uiautomator2 ~= ADB
It is recommended to choose minitouch. It is not recommended to choose Hermit unless it is under vmos.

AdbRestart.name: Try restarting adb when the device cannot be detected

_info.name: Simulator settings
_info.help: The following values ​​​​are automatically filled in based on Serial. If you do not understand, please do not modify it at will. Modifying the port will automatically start the corresponding instance.

HandleError.name: Enable exception handling
HandleError.help: Handle some exceptions and retreat when an error occurs.

SaveError.name: When an error occurs, save the log and screenshots

StrictRestart.name: Prohibit restarting when errors occur in sensitive tasks
StrictRestart.help:
Stop Alas when an error occurs while running sensitive tasks instead of restarting the game
Sensitive tasks include hidden sea areas, abyssal sea areas, and cross-month daily tasks.

SaveErrorCount.name: Error Log storage upper limit
SaveErrorCount.help: Error logs exceeding the upper limit will be deleted. If it is 0 or a negative value, there is no limit.

OnePushConfig.name: Wrong push settings
OnePushConfig.help: After an unhandled exception occurs, use Onepush to push an error message. See the documentation for configuration methods: https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/Onepush-configuration-%5BCN%5D

ScreenshotLength.name: On error, keep the last X screenshots

GameStuckRestart.name: Restart the emulator when the game freezes
GameStuckRestart.help: After the game freezes (triggers GameStuckError) for the specified number of times, try restarting the emulator. It may help solve problems such as emulator freeze or memory overflow.

GameStuckThreshold.name: Game stuck restart threshold
GameStuckThreshold.help: How many consecutive times it is stuck before triggering a restart.

AdbOfflineRestart.name: Restart the emulator when the device is not detected
AdbOfflineRestart.help: After the device cannot be detected continuously (ADB is offline or the connection fails) for the specified number of times, try to restart the emulator.

AdbOfflineThreshold.name: Device restart threshold not detected
AdbOfflineThreshold.help: The number of times the device cannot be detected in a row triggers a restart.

ScreenshotInterval.name: Slow down the screenshot speed to X seconds
ScreenshotInterval.help: The minimum interval between two screenshots is limited to 0.1 ~ 0.3, which can reduce CPU usage for high-configuration computers.

CombatScreenshotInterval.name: Slow down the screenshot speed to X seconds during battle
CombatScreenshotInterval.help: The minimum interval between taking two screenshots is limited to 0.3 ~ 1.0, which can reduce CPU usage during combat.

TaskHoardingDuration.name: Hoarding task X minutes
TaskHoardingDuration.help:
Can reduce the frequency of operating games during the collection period
After the task is triggered, wait for X minutes and then execute the stored tasks at once

WhenTaskQueueEmpty.name: When the task queue is cleared
WhenTaskQueueEmpty.help: Closing the game when there is no task can reduce CPU usage during food collection

AzurStatsID.name: AzurStat ID
AzurStatsID.help:
The client ID declared when uploading to https://azur-stats.lyoko.io
Composed of random characters and can be modified at will

API.name: Upload line
API.help: If domestic users cannot connect to AzurStat, they can use "domestic reverse proxy"

CombatRecord.name: Battle drop screenshots
CombatRecord.help:
When enabled, it will slow down clicks during checkout.
It does not take effect under self-discipline to seek enemies.

TelemetryReport.name: Telemetry data reporting
TelemetryReport.help: After being enabled, CL1 statistics (anonymous data such as the number of battles and Akashi encounter probability) will be reported anonymously to the server on a regular basis. For details on ID generation, please see the source code. For statistical information https://alas.nanoda.work/

BugReport.name: Bug log reporting
BugReport.help: When enabled, bug logs will be anonymously reported to the server when an exception is encountered to help improve ID generation. See the source code for details.

_info.name: log
_info.help: It will take effect after the scheduler is restarted.

RetireMode.name: Retirement mode
RetireMode.help: If you choose to strengthen, you will fall back to one-click retirement when the strengthening materials are insufficient.

_info.name: shared mood
_info.help:
Can use the same team to complete multiple tasks
When using this function, please ensure that the fleet function of the corresponding task is to clear all single teams, and the team is a shared team.

Enable.name: Enable shared moods
Enable.help: After enabling, the shared mood will be used, and the following mood configuration will replace the original configuration.

Tasks.name: Shared mood tasks
Tasks.help:
Select tasks that use a shared mood, separated by half-width commas, such as "Main, Event, EventA"
Main Line Diagram-1: Main, Main Line Diagram-2: Main2, Main Line Diagram-3: Main3
Activity Diagram-1: Event, Activity Diagram-2: Event2, War Archives: WarArchives
Daily A chart: EventA, Daily B chart: EventB, Daily C chart: EventC, Daily D chart: EventD, Daily SP chart: EventSp

FleetRecover.name: mood reply
FleetRecover.not_in_dormitory: Not placed in the back house (20/h)
FleetRecover.dormitory_floor_1: First floor of the back house (40/h)
FleetRecover.dormitory_floor_2: Second floor of the back house (50/h)

FleetOnsen.name: All members have placed hot springs (+10/h)

_info.name: Yukikaze-sama's task management
_info.help: Task-related priority and scheduling settings.

TaskPriorityAdjustment.name: Task priority adjustment
TaskPriorityAdjustment.help:
Restart # Restart the game
> OpsiCrossMonth > OpsiDailyDelay #大世界cross月日 > The big world mission is postponed
> Commission > Tactical > Research # Commission > Tactical Academy > Research
> Exercise # Exercise
> Dorm > Meowfficer > Guild > Gacha # 后 residence > Command Meow > Grand Fleet > Daily Card Drawing
> Reward # harvest
> ShopFrequent > ShopOnce > Shipyard > Freebies > Island # General Store > Other Stores > Development Shipyard > Freebie Rewards > Island Plan
> PrivateQuarters # Quarters Plan
> OpsiExplore # Monthly exploration
> Minigame > Awaken # Minigame > Cognitive Awakening
>OpsiAshBeacon #meta combat
> OpsiDaily > OpsiShop > OpsiVoucher #大世界daily > Port Store > Exchange Store
> OpsiAbyssal > OpsiStronghold > OpsiObscure > OpsiArchive # Abyssal Sea > Siren Fortress > Hidden Sea > Archive Coordinates
> Daily > Hard > OpsiAshBeacon > OpsiAshAssist > OpsiMonthBoss #Daily Challenge > Difficulty Map > Meta Combat > Meta Support > Monthly Boss
> Sos > EventSp > EventA > EventB > EventC > EventD # Sos > Event Daily SP > Event Daily A > Event Daily B > Event Daily C > Event Daily D
> RaidDaily > CoalitionSp > WarArchives > MaritimeEscort # Common Fighting Activities Daily > Common Fighting Activities sp > Combat Archives > Merchant Ship Escort
> Event > Event2 > Raid > Hospital > HospitalEvent > Coalition > RaidScuttle > Main > Main2 > Main3 # Activity diagram > Activity diagram 2 > Fight together > Hospital event > Fight together > Shipwreck together > Main line > Main line 2 > Main line 3
> OpsiMeowfficerFarming # Short cat meets
> GemsFarming # Refresh emergency commission
> OpsiHazard1Leveling # eroding one leveling
> ThreeOilLowCost # Three oil low consumption

_info.name: One-click retirement settings
_info.help: Only takes effect when "Retirement Mode" is set to "One-click retirement"

KeepLimitBreak.name: Keep the star-filled ship with the same name
KeepLimitBreak.help:
When there are no ships of the same name with full stars, several ships of the same name that meet the conditions for retirement will be retained.
If one-click retirement cannot be retired, please set it to "No retention"

_info.name: Harden settings
_info.help: Only takes effect when "Retirement Mode" is set to "Hardened"

ShipToEnhance.name: Ships in need of reinforcement
ShipToEnhance.favourite: Only commonly used ships are strengthened

Filter.name: Enhance filter string
Filter.help:
Format: "cv > bb > ...",
Leave blank to use the default enhancement method

CheckPerCategory.name: Number of reinforcements per category
CheckPerCategory.help:
How many ships can be enhanced at most for each ship category?
Ships in combat will be skipped and not counted,
Prioritize whether there are strengthening materials

_info.name: Traditional decommissioning setup
_info.help:
Only takes effect when "Retirement Mode" is set to "Legacy Retirement"
NOTE: Traditional retirement based on character rarity, possible retirement of Bree

Name.name: Level name (enter 7-2-3 to retreat using 7-2 three battles)
Name.help:
For example, 7-2, 12-4, D3, SP4, case-insensitive
If the level is missing, please wait for the update

Event.name: Activity name
Event.event_20200507_cn: The Way Home in the Night
Event.event_20200521_en: Iris of Light and Dark Rerun
Event.event_20200806_cn: The Enigma and the Shark Rerun
Event.event_20200820_cn: Scherzo of Iron and Blood Rerun
Event.event_20211028_tw: 復刻光與影的鳶尾之華
Event.event_20220526_cn: Pledge of the Radiant Court Rerun
Event.event_20221124_cn: The Alchemist and the Archipelago of Secrets Rerun
Event.event_20231026_cn: Tempesta and the Fountain of Youth
Event.event_20250520_cn: A Rose on the High Tower
Event.event_20250724_cn: The Alchemist and the Tower of Horizons
Event.raid_20200624: Air Raid Drills with Essex Rerun
Event.war_archives_20180726_cn: archives Iris of Light and Dark
Event.war_archives_20200507_cn: archives The Way Home in the Night
Event.war_archives_20200806_cn: archives The Enigma and the Shark
Event.war_archives_20200820_cn: archives Scherzo of Iron and Blood
Event.war_archives_20200903_cn: archives Stars of the Shimmering Fjord
Event.war_archives_20220526_cn: archives Pledge of the Radiant Court
Event.war_archives_20231026_cn: archives Tempesta and the Fountain of Youth

Use2xBook.name: Use efficient combat instructions
Use2xBook.help: Double oil consumption, two drop settlements

UseRecommendFleet.name: Automatic teaming
UseRecommendFleet.help: Use the recommended lineup built into the game to automatically complete difficult map team formations

_info.name: Stop condition
_info.help: Stop the task after any of the following conditions are triggered

OilLimit.name: Oil falls below X after postponement
OilLimit.help: Delay the mission when the oil is too low, and continue the attack when the oil is sufficient

RunCount.name: Stop after the number of attacks is greater than X
RunCount.help:
Each time it is run, the number of times is reduced by one, and the task is stopped after returning to zero.
0 means no limit on the number of times

MapAchievement.name: Stop after reaching the level achievement
MapAchievement.help:
Achieve 100% clearance of the map, achieve three-star clearance, and achieve safe sea area.
Or stop after reaching a safe sea area without hitting three stars.
MapAchievement.threat_safe: 100% clearance + three stars + safe sea area

StageIncrease.name: After reaching the level achievement, move forward to open up wasteland.
StageIncrease.help:
To automatically open up wasteland, you need to ensure that the team has sufficient strength, ensure that the team meets the level attribute restrictions, and set "stop after achieving the level achievement"
For example, if you turn on this option and select "Map Pass", you will go to the next level after the level is 100% cleared.
Maps that support automatic land reclamation: 1-1 to 15-4, A1 to A3, B1 to B3, C1 to C3, D1 to D3, T1 to T6, SP1 to SP4

ReachLevel.name: Stops when the ship reaches level X
ReachLevel.help:
Any ship below level X will stop after upgrading to level X.
0 means no level restriction

Fleet1Mode.name: One team self-discipline mode
Fleet1Mode.hide_in_bottom_left: Hide in the lower left corner

Fleet1Step.name: A team of steps
Fleet1Step.help: Limit movement distance in activity diagram

Fleet2Mode.name: Second team self-discipline mode
Fleet2Mode.hide_in_bottom_left: Hide in the lower left corner

Fleet2Step.name: Second team step length
Fleet2Step.help: Limit movement distance in activity diagram

FleetOrder.name: fleet functions
FleetOrder.help:
If you don't have self-discipline to look for enemies, you will pick up question marks and ammunition.
When engaging in 4 battles or less without self-discipline to search for enemies, "One team will be cleared and the other team will be on standby".
FleetOrder.fleet1_mob_fleet2_boss: The boss of the second team in the first team
FleetOrder.fleet1_boss_fleet2_mob: The boss of the first team and the second team are in the middle
FleetOrder.fleet1_all_fleet2_standby: The first team is cleared and the second team is on standby.
FleetOrder.fleet1_standby_fleet2_all: The first team is on standby and the second team is cleared

Mode.name: submarine attack plan
Mode.help: It only takes effect when self-disciplined enemy hunting is turned off. Reminder: 'Hunting and BOSS battle' is a mixture of 'Hunting only' and 'BOSS battle only'. It will carry out hunting strikes in the road and try to summon submarines in BOSS battles.

AutoSearchMode.name: submarine self-discipline plan
AutoSearchMode.help: Only effective under self-discipline to seek enemies

DistanceToBoss.name: Move the submarine near the BOSS before the BOSS fight
DistanceToBoss.help:
It only takes effect when the "Submarine Attack Plan" is "BOSS Battle Only" or "Hunting and BOSS Battle"
Selecting "X grid from BOSS" requires ensuring that the submarine hunting range can cover the BOSS. The distance is calculated using Manhattan distance. Selecting "Use ocean support" requires U522/Da Vinci in the submarine team.

Mode.name: Mood settings
Mode.calculate_ignore: Calculate mood consumption + ignore red face attack warning

Fleet1Recover.name: A team's mood reply
Fleet1Recover.not_in_dormitory: Not placed in the back house (20/h)
Fleet1Recover.dormitory_floor_1: First floor of the back house (40/h)
Fleet1Recover.dormitory_floor_2: Second floor of the back house (50/h)

Fleet1Oath.name: All members of the first team are married (+10/h)

Fleet1Onsen.name: All members of a team have placed hot springs (+10/h)

Fleet2Recover.name: Second team’s mood reply
Fleet2Recover.not_in_dormitory: Not placed in the back house (20/h)
Fleet2Recover.dormitory_floor_1: First floor of the back house (40/h)
Fleet2Recover.dormitory_floor_2: Second floor of the back house (50/h)

Fleet2Oath.name: All members of the second team are married (+10/h)

Fleet2Onsen.name: All members of the second team have placed hot springs (+10/h)

_info.name: blood volume control
_info.help: Only takes effect when lineup lock is turned off

UseHpBalance.name: Enable health balance
UseHpBalance.help: Move the one with low health volume to the protective position, and move the one with high health volume to the injury-bearing position.

HpBalanceThreshold.name: Change position when the blood volume difference in the front row is greater than X

HpBalanceWeight.name: Vanguard health weight
HpBalanceWeight.help:
If there is a difference in the fleshiness of the pioneer, it should be modified, and the format
1000, 1000, 1000

RepairUseSingleThreshold.name: After any ship's health drops below X, use emergency repair

RepairUseMultiThreshold.name: After all ships' health drops below X, use emergency repair

LowHpRetreatThreshold.name: When the HP of any ship falls below X, retreat

_info.name: Enemy hunting logic
_info.help: Customize the priority of the enemies you want to fight

EnemyScaleBalanceWeight.name: enemy priority
EnemyScaleBalanceWeight.help: First clear the enemies on the main route to the BOSS, and then clear other enemies according to priority.

_info.name: 1-1 Ambush to gain favor
_info.help: After entering 1-1, jump repeatedly near C1

_info.name: 7-2 Three stations for garbage collection
_info.help: Fight three battles, then retreat after picking out question marks

StepOnA3.name: Use the second team to step on A3
StepOnA3.help: It can effectively prevent the question mark point of A2 from being blocked.

_info.name: 12-2 Medium leveling
_info.help:
Use a low-strength team to level up at 12-2, and retreat after defeating non-three-star enemies.
Increase the experience/fuel consumption ratio by reducing team strength

_info.name: 12-4 Large-scale leveling
_info.help:
Use a strong team to level up at 12-4, and retreat after defeating three-star enemies.
Increase the experience/fuel consumption ratio by defeating more three-star enemies

NonLargeEnterTolerance.name: After entering the map, X fights no three-star enemies and retreats.

NonLargeRetreatTolerance.name: Fight up to X non-three-star enemies

PickupAmmo.name: X Pick up ammo after battle

_info.name: Refresh emergency commission
_info.help:
Warning: This feature allows players to obtain a small amount of diamonds, but is not an efficient way to obtain diamonds.
Players who have been playing Azur Lane for a short time can easily become superstitious about zero breakage and low consumption, while neglecting character development.
Running this function will only make you feel very fulfilled, but your account will actually have zero improvement.
The main purpose of this function is to allow players with a formed lineup to obtain additional Rubik's Cubes. Please treat diamonds rationally as a by-product.

This feature will replace the flagship after flagship level 32
Regarding the emergency commission refresh mechanism, you can read https://bbs.nga.cn/read.php?tid=27134956
Commissioned fuel consumption ratio: A3 > A1 > 2-4 > 2-1. It is recommended to choose the activity diagram when there is an activity diagram. 2-1 will pick the question mark to have more supplies.
One team will complete all battles. The front row should be level 100 zero-break destroyer with output equipment, and the back row should be level 33 and below white-skin zero-break aircraft carriers.
The second team should provide cross-team support (cross-team barrage, cross-team assistance)

When the fleet function cannot be set, the mission should be stopped in the following ways to avoid cross-team attacks and a large amount of oil being consumed:
If error push is set, a task stop message will be pushed and the task will be stopped.
If error push is not set, Alas will be stopped directly.

ChangeFlagship.name: Change flagship
ChangeFlagship.help:
Change flagship when flagship level >= 32 or red face
Look for white-skinned aircraft carriers with levels between 1-31, and choose replacement flagships when they retire. All white-skinned aircraft carriers with levels greater than level 1 will be considered decommissioned targets. Please be sure to target ships that are not targets. Change flagship equipment when changing ships, this is done by recording the previous equipment.

Changing equipment will only change the slot in the equipment, even white equipment will be changed. If a flagship is specified, all 5 equipment will be replaced. If a flagship is not specified, only the equipment will be replaced.

CommonCVFilter.name: Custom Flagship Carrier Filter
CommonCVFilter.help:
To use a custom filter, you need to set "Specify Flagship Carrier" to "Custom", and the flagship carrier will be selected first for replacement according to the order of the filter.
bogue: Borg ranger: raider langley: Langley hermes: athletic god

ChangeVanguard.name: Replace front row
ChangeVanguard.help:
Change the front row when the front row is red. If you choose not to change, the red face will be forced to attack.
To change the front row, you need to find a white eagle or iron-blooded white-skin ship with a mood of no less than 10 and a level of 100 to drive away, so try to ensure that there are enough to drive away. Outside the national server, it is the level 70 White Eagle White Ship Expulsion.

CommonDDFilter.name: Custom front row filter
CommonDDFilter.help:
To use a custom filter, you need to set "Specify Front Row" to "Custom", and the front row will be replaced first according to the filter order.
z20：Z20 z21：Z21 aulick：Aulick foote：Foot cassin：Cassin downes：Downs

EquipmentCode.name: Equipment code
EquipmentCode.help:
Only takes effect when "Change Ship + Equipment" is selected.
When changing a ship, if the current ship equipment code in the settings is null, it will be exported; when changing a ship, if the current ship equipment code in the settings is null, the equipment code exported from the previous ship will be used, otherwise the equipment code in the settings will be used.
Bluestacks simulator users need to enable the virtual keyboard first. For details, see https://support.bluestacks.com/hc/zh-tw/articles/360061968892-%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E5%9C% A8-BlueStacks-5-%E4%B8%8A%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%B0%8F%E9%8D%B5%E7%9B%A4-%E8%99%9B%E6%93%AC%E9%8D%B5%E7%9B%A4
DD: front row expulsion bogue: Borg hermes: athletic god langley: Langley ranger: raider

ALLowHighFlagshipLevel.name: Only replace the full-level rear row
ALLowHighFlagshipLevel.help:
After opening, only level 100 white-skin light aircraft will be selected when changing flagships.
Please make sure there are qualified ships in the dock when using it.

ALLowLowVanguardLevel.name: Replaceable low-level front row
ALLowLowVanguardLevel.help: After opening, the front row level limit is changed to level 30 or above. If it is difficult mode (such as the CD picture), it will be changed to level 70.

DelayTaskIFNoFlagship.name: Postpone mission when there is no replacement flagship
DelayTaskIFNoFlagship.help: When changing the flagship, if a white aircraft carrier that meets the conditions cannot be found, the mission will be postponed.

CommissionLimit.name: Prevent the number of emergency commissions from being too large
CommissionLimit.help: To prevent the number of emergency orders from being too large and unable to complete daily orders when running 7x24, it is recommended to select only short-term high-yield orders in the order filter.

PtLimit.name: Active PT limits
PtLimit.help:
When the accumulated PT reaches a given value, all active tasks are disabled. 0 means no limit. It cannot be triggered immediately when using self-discipline to seek enemies.
After turning it on, you only need to open all active tasks without counting how many times you have played them in total.

TimeLimit.name: Activity time limit
TimeLimit.help:
When the local time exceeds the given value, all active tasks are disabled. '2020-01-01 00:00:00' means no limit. The time will be reset after triggering once.
After setting, it can prevent forgetting to close the task after the activity is over.

_info.name: Task balancing settings
_info.help: Prevent supplies from being too low when running activity diagrams

Enable.name: Enable task balancing
Enable.help: When enabled, the amount of supplies will be checked after each sortie

TaskCall.name: Call task X when supplies are too low
TaskCall.help: Reminder: Players need to set the called task in advance, otherwise it will not work

LastStage.name: Last completed level
LastStage.help: The automatically updated value will skip the completed levels in the filter and reset after 0 points.

_info.name: Fight together and sink the ship
Fighting together every day
_info.help: Complete daily battles on easy and normal difficulty

UseRecommendFleet.name: Use Fleet Recommendations
UseRecommendFleet.help: If turned off, you need to manually team up all 15 levels in advance

_info.name: merchant ship escort
_info.help: If you enter and then retreat, you can get about 70% of the reward.

_info.name: Activity settings
_info.help: Teams must be manually allocated in the game before going out.

Mode.name: difficulty
Mode.help: SP graph needs to be run using active daily SP

PresetFilter.name: Active store filter
PresetFilter.help: Generally, the default is to buy all

CustomFilter.name: Custom filters
CustomFilter.help: To use a custom filter, you need to set the "Activity Store Filter" to "Custom" and read https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/filter_string_cn

PresetFilter.name: delegate filter
PresetFilter.help:
If you do not have enough understanding of the output and benefits of the commission, it is not recommended to write a custom filter. It is recommended to use a pre-optimized commission filter.
If you run the brush emergency commission function 24 hours a day, you should use the filter (7x24 brush commission).
It is not recommended to use the oil priority filter while running the emergency commission function.
PresetFilter.cube_24h: Diamond > Rubik's Cube > Oil (7x24 brush commission)
PresetFilter.chip_24h: Diamond > Mind > Rubik's Cube (7x24 brush commission)

CustomFilter.name: Custom delegate filter
CustomFilter.help: To use a custom filter, you need to set "Delegated Filter" to "Custom" and read https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/filter_string_cn

DoMajorCommission.name: Make the main commission (1200 oil/1000 oil commission)
DoMajorCommission.help: The 1200 oil commission is now obsolete and the yield is very low. It is recommended to close it.

RapidTrainingSlot.name: Use quick learning
RapidTrainingSlot.help: During the event, there are 10 quick skill learning sessions per day

_info.name: Overflow experience control
_info.help:
Prevent the use of advanced skill books from overflowing a large amount of experience when skills are almost at full level.
For example, if the T3 book overflows by 100 points and the T4 book overflows by 100 points, when there are 1100 experience points left, the T4 book will not be used and the T3 book will be used instead.

T4Allow.name: Allow T4 skill book to overflow X experience points

T3Allow.name: Allow T3 skill book to overflow X experience points

T2Allow.name: Allow T2 skill book to overflow X experience points

T1Allow.name: Allow T1 skill book to overflow X experience points

_info.name: learn new skills
_info.help: When there is a vacant position in the Tactics Academy, a ship girl will be automatically assigned and will learn the first skill that is not yet full level.

_info.name: research
_info.help:
When filters work with other settings, Alas looks for items that satisfy all user settings simultaneously.
For example, if you set the scientific research filter to `H1 > D2.5 > shortest` (including scientific research that consumes Rubik's cubes), but also set it not to allow the consumption of Rubik's cubes, the final result is that Alas will not select scientific research that consumes Rubik's cubes. When you suddenly want to cut a Rubik's Cube, you only need to open the Rubik's Cube without modifying the filter, which is more convenient.

UseCube.name: Use Rubik's Cube
UseCube.only_05_hour: 0.5 hours + when there are no projects to do
UseCube.only_no_project: When there are no projects to do

UseCoin.name: Use supplies
UseCoin.only_05_hour: 0.5 hours + when there are no projects to do
UseCoin.only_no_project: When there are no projects to do

UsePart.name: Use widgets
UsePart.only_05_hour: 0.5 hours + when there are no projects to do
UsePart.only_no_project: When there are no projects to do

AllowDelay.name: Delaying scientific research when resources are insufficient
AllowDelay.help:
When resources are insufficient, Alas will delay scientific research until conditions are met or the scientific research queue is about to be cleared, which will not cause scientific research to stop.
If resources remain insufficient for a long time or Alas is not running long enough, you can cancel this option to keep the research queue full.

PresetFilter.name: Research filter
PresetFilter.help: For scientific research drops and project refreshes, please see https://azur-stats.lyoko.io/. People who do not have a basic understanding of these are not recommended to write custom filters. It is recommended to use pre-optimized scientific research filters.
PresetFilter.series_2_than_3_457_234: The second phase takes into account the third phase 457+234

CustomFilter.name: Custom research filters
CustomFilter.help: To use a custom filter, you need to set "Research Filter" to "Custom" and read https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/filter_string_cn

BuyFood.name: Automatically purchase food
BuyFood.help: For status display only. Disable setting. Do not ask anything about this switch.

_info.name: Event furniture setup
_info.help: Purchase limited-time furniture from Houzhai Furniture Mall during the event

BuyOption.name: Purchase plan
BuyOption.help:
Buy a set: buy one piece of each piece of furniture; buy all: buy all the furniture up to the limit. Both purchase options will remove the set of furniture from the front of the furniture store. If you purchase one set, the remaining furniture will need to be purchased manually.
There is not much difference in furniture consumption between the two options, so it is recommended to purchase all of them. Will not buy diamond furniture

LastRun.name: Last check time
LastRun.help: Record the time of the last check to prevent the task from running repeatedly. The check interval is 6 days. This value is automatically recorded and generally does not need to be modified.

BuyAmount.name: Buy X cat boxes every day
BuyAmount.help: The first cat box of the day is free

Mode.name: training mode
Mode.help:
Seamless Cat Training will collect command cats every 2.5 ~ 3.5 hours
Collect one every day means collect one every day, collect them all on Sunday, strengthen and refill the queue to complete the weekly tasks

RetainTalentedGold.name: Target golden cats with special talents
RetainTalentedGold.help: Cats with special talents are locked when collecting command cats. The locked cats will not be used for enhancement. Users need to manually check and unlock unnecessary cats.

RetainTalentedPurple.name: Target purple cats with special talents
RetainTalentedPurple.help: Cats with special talents are locked when collecting command cats. The locked cats will not be used for enhancement. Users need to manually check and unlock unnecessary cats.

EnhanceIndex.name: Use a cat without special talents to strengthen the Xth cat
EnhanceIndex.help: The Xth cat in the cat warehouse, limited to 1 ~ 12, in order from upper left to lower right

MaxFeedLevel.name: Do not use cats larger than level X as reinforcement materials

Enable.name: Activate Grand Fleet Logistics
Enable.help: Receive the Grand Fleet mission, submit preparation materials, and receive Fleet rewards

SelectNewMission.name: Choose a new weekly fleet mission
SelectNewMission.help:
This account needs to be the fleet commander or deputy commander to open it.
By default, Siren Annihilation III, which is the easiest to complete, is selected. The task is to sink 300 ships of any enemy.

ExchangeFilter.name: Prepare Item Filter
ExchangeFilter.help: Generally no modification is needed, the one with the least consumption is preferred.

SelectNewOperation.name: Start a new grand fleet battle
SelectNewOperation.help:
This account needs to be the fleet commander or deputy commander to open it.
By default, the sea and air battle on Dagukanal Island with the most rewards is selected.

NewOperationMaxDate.name: After the Xth day of each month, no new Grand Fleet battles will be started.
NewOperationMaxDate.help:
Only takes effect when "Start New Grand Fleet Combat" is enabled
It is not recommended to start three large fleet battles per month, because each player can only participate twice a month, and most members cannot participate in the dispatch of the third battle. This will affect the evaluation of dispatch events, resulting in a reduction in final rewards

JoinThreshold.name: Only participate in Grand Fleet battles when combat progress >
JoinThreshold.help: 0.0 ~ 1.0. For example, '0.5' means to join only when the combat progress is less than half, and '1' means to join directly regardless of the progress.

BossFleetRecommend.name: Use the recommended fleet to defeat the boss
BossFleetRecommend.help: It is recommended to close it and arrange your own team

_info.name: cognitive awakening
_info.help: Cognitive Awakening All ships in the dock until mental units are exhausted

Favourite.name: Only commonly used ships are awakened

BuySkinBox.name: Buy appearance equipment box
BuySkinBox.help: To reduce maintenance costs, the appearance box selector in the filter will not be updated with the game, but Alas will treat any unknown item with a quantity of 1 and consuming 7000 supplies as an appearance box and purchase it.

ConsumeCoins.name: Consumption of overflow supplies
ConsumeCoins.help: When the supplies exceed 550,000, purchase all items that consume supplies.

Refresh.name: Refresh store
Refresh.help: Refreshing requires 50 fleet coins. Fleet coins are not valuable. It is recommended to open them.

PR1.name: Selection of scientific research drawings for the first phase

PR2.name: Selection of scientific research drawings for the second phase

PR3.name: Selection of scientific research drawings for the third phase

_info.name: Color scientific research drawing purchase settings
_info.help: Buy color science drawings every day, the discounts for color science drawings and gold science drawings are counted independently, and you can buy 2 pieces of each for free every day

ResearchSeries.name: Scientific research period
ResearchSeries.4: The fourth phase of scientific research
ResearchSeries.5: The fifth phase of scientific research

ShipIndex.name: Ship serial number
ShipIndex.help: Counting from left to right, starting from 1

BuyAmount.name: Purchase quantity
BuyAmount.help: The first two tickets every day are free

LastRun.name: Last purchase time
LastRun.help: Because the game does not display how many tickets have been purchased today, the time of the last purchase is recorded here to prevent the task from running repeatedly. This value is automatically recorded and generally does not need to be modified.

_info.name: Gold Scientific Research Drawings Purchase Settings

ResearchSeries.name: Scientific research period
ResearchSeries.4: The fourth phase of scientific research
ResearchSeries.5: The fifth phase of scientific research

ShipIndex.name: Ship serial number
ShipIndex.help: Counting from left to right, starting from 1

BuyAmount.name: Purchase quantity
BuyAmount.help: The first two tickets every day are free

LastRun.name: Last purchase time
LastRun.help: Because the game does not display how many tickets have been purchased today, the time of the last purchase is recorded here to prevent the task from running repeatedly. This value is automatically recorded and generally does not need to be modified.

_info.name: Daily card draw
_info.help: Draw cards to complete daily tasks. Draw a light pool every day to get 200 supplies.

UseTicket.name: Use a single construction ticket
UseTicket.help: After opening, pools that support construction coupons will be built with construction coupons first. If there are no construction coupons and ordinary pools are built, Rubik's Cube will still be used.

UseDrill.name: Use a drill to complete the build
UseDrill.help: Do you want to wait until tomorrow to go into the water? Can you be greedy for a drill bit?

ForceCollect.name: Forced collection of file keys
ForceCollect.help: When the file key is full, it is compulsory to collect it (remove the red dots)

DayOfWeek.name: Extend to day of the week
DayOfWeek.help: It is recommended to set it to weekdays (Monday to Friday) to avoid missing purchases

BuyRoses.name: Buy weekly romance scores
BuyRoses.help:
The number of romance purchases is reset every Monday
Each run will try to purchase them all at once. If the supplies are insufficient (less than 24K), the purchase will be canceled and postponed to the next day.

BuyCake.name: Buy a weekly cake gift box
BuyCake.help:
The number of cake gift box purchases resets every Monday
Each run will try to purchase them all at once. If there are not enough diamonds (less than 210 diamonds), the purchase will be canceled and postponed to the next day.

TargetInteract.name: Clear your daily energy
TargetInteract.help: Interact with the selected ship girl to clear today’s energy

TargetShip.name: Choose a ship girl to interact with every day
TargetShip.help: Choose the ship girl you want to interact with on a daily basis

UseDailySkip.name: Use quick challenges
UseDailySkip.help: After winning the daily level S, the sweep will be unlocked. If it is not unlocked, it will automatically fall back to the traditional attack.

EscortMission.name: Merchant Ship Escort (Parts Book, Torpedo Book)

EscortMissionFleet.name: Merchant ships escort the sortie fleet

SupplyLineDisruption.name: Breaking Diplomacy (Submarine Edition)
SupplyLineDisruption.help: Quick challenges need to be unlocked or they will be skipped

EmergencyModuleDevelopment.name: Limited-time military equipment training (limited-time military equipment book)

_info.name: Difficulty diagram
_info.help: To run the daily difficulty map, you need to unlock the weekly mode. Before unlocking, you should use the main map function.

_info.name: exercise
_info.help: Play drills and retreat automatically when the blood volume is too low

DelayUntilHoursBeforeNextUpdate.name: Postpone exercise until X hours before next update

OpponentChooseMode.name: Opponent selection mode
OpponentChooseMode.easiest_else_exp: The simplest first and then the most experienced

ExerciseStrategy.name: exercise strategy
ExerciseStrategy.help: If you keep 5 times, you will try to attack the marshal at the set time, and all times will be cleared after refreshing at 18:00 on Sunday.

LowHpThreshold.name: Retreat after blood volume drops below X

LowHpConfirmWait.name: After the blood volume falls below the threshold, retreat after X seconds
LowHpConfirmWait.help: Recommend 1.0 ~ 3.0, because the character portrait will cover the health bar, so it takes a certain amount of time to confirm whether the blood volume is really below the threshold.

OpponentRefreshValue.name: Today’s exercise opponents have been refreshed X times
OpponentRefreshValue.help:
Automatically updated value, reset after 0 o'clock
If you manually refresh the opponent, you should modify this value

_info.name: META support
_info.help: Beacon support three times a day

Tier.name: Find beacons with level greater than X
Tier.help: If you try several times and still can't find a beacon that meets the criteria, try randomly.

_info.name: General settings for the big world
_info.help: All big world features use these settings

UseLogger.name: Using a coordinate recorder
UseLogger.help: Every time you enter the warehouse, use all coordinate recorders

BuyActionPointLimit.name: Buying power X times
BuyActionPointLimit.help: Maximum number of times to buy power

OilLimit.name: When buying momentum, keep X points of oil

RepairThreshold.name: After the HP of any ship is lower than X, it will return to port for repairs.

UseRepairPack.name: Repair a boat using a repair box
UseRepairPack.help: After turning it on, the repair box in the warehouse will be used to repair the ship. It is recommended to use it with the erosion 1 leveling function.

RepairPackThreshold.name: After the HP of any ship is lower than X, use the repair box to repair it.
RepairPackThreshold.help:
Only takes effect when "Use repair box to repair ship" is turned on
Only attempt repairs after defeating the Abyss, Siren Fortress, and Monthly Boss.
0.0~1.0

DoRandomMapEvent.name: Complete random events on the map
DoRandomMapEvent.help: After completing the self-disciplined enemy search, scan the map again, purchase the Akashi Store, use the siren information collection device, use the siren detection device, and unlock the two fleet mechanisms.

AkashiShopFilter.name: store filter
AkashiShopFilter.help: By default, only the physical strength nanoda is purchased. If you want to buy purple coins, set to 'ActionPoint > PurpleCoins'

NotifyOpsiMail.name: Push information related to the big world
NotifyOpsiMail.help: To push information about erosion 1 and short cats, you need to turn on the "error push" function at the same time. Because there is a lot of information, it may be noisy.

OneHitMode.name: One click and go
OneHitMode.help:
Only attack each beacon once, then call for support every half hour.
Does not work in profile beacons

DossierAutoAttackMode.name: Archive Beacon Automated Combat
DossierAutoAttackMode.help: Automatically fight after the first battle at the archive beacon. Currently only available in the Chinese server.

RequestAssist.name: Call for support
RequestAssist.help:
Before placing a beacon, call for support from friends, fleets, and the world
Does not work in profile beacons

EnsureFullyCollected.name: Guaranteed to collect 200 beacon data per day
EnsureFullyCollected.help: Before the collection is full, the mobility retention setting is temporarily ignored, and "short cat connection" needs to be turned on at the same time.

AutoCollectShip.name: Automatically obtain new META ships
AutoCollectShip.help: New META ships will be automatically obtained when receiving rewards. After closing, the "Click to Sync" button will not be clicked and needs to be collected manually.

Filter.name: Sortie Fleet Filter
Filter.help:
Fight the BOSS in wheel battles. If one fleet dies, replace it with another.
Please make sure the fleet is strong enough to defeat the BOSS in the end.
Use "CallSubmarine" to call a sub before combat, but the run interval will be increased to 60 minutes

Submarine.name: call submarine
Submarine.help: When turned on, the running interval will increase to 60 minutes

_info.name: Open up the big world
_info.help:
At the beginning of each month, you can open up all sea areas in the world without buying a battle information recorder (5000 oil props).
This function will clear a sea area every 27 minutes to ensure that the airspace search is cooled down
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground

SpecialRadar.name: The battle information recorder has been purchased (5000 oil props)
SpecialRadar.help:
The battle information recorder is not required to be purchased
Cannot be checked if not purchased and used

ForceRun.name: Forced to run regardless of running interval
ForceRun.help: Once turned on, it will consume additional mobility. Generally, there is no need to turn it on, just play it slowly.

IfSkipSirenResearch.name: Skip Siren Research Device
IfSkipSirenResearch.help:
When turned on, the Siren research device corresponding to the coordinate level will be skipped to facilitate bug fixes.
After preliminary testing in several sea areas, a complete monthly land reclamation has not been completed, and there may be unknown problems.

SkipedSirenResearch.name: Have jumped over the sea area of ​​​​the Siren Research Device
SkipedSirenResearch.help:
This value is automatically recorded and does not need to be modified manually.
It will be reset when the land is reclaimed at the beginning of the month, or the "last completed area" is changed to 0 and the monthly land reclamation is run again to reset.

LastZone.name: Last completed area
LastZone.help:
Automatically updated value. Fill in 0 to reset the progress. After reset, the opened sea area will be automatically skipped.
Support sea area ID, national server/international server/Japanese server/Taiwan server sea area name, such as "51", "NA Ocean SE Sector E", "NA Ocean SE Sector E"

_info.name: big world store
_info.help:
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable the large world reclamation mission or use the campaign information recorder (5000 oil props)
- The next month after clearing the main line of the big world, that is, the port store will become a new version of the store and can be used.

PresetFilter.name: port store filter
PresetFilter.help:
Generally speaking, the default is sufficient. If there is overflow of free tickets, it is recommended to select "High Value Items and META Materials". For newbies, it is recommended to select "Do Not Purchase META Materials". This will buy everything except META materials.
High-value items are mobility, coordinates, and gold or higher-level products; META materials include META general tactical textbooks and 4 types of strengthening materials.
PresetFilter.max_benefit_meta: High value items and META materials

CustomFilter.name: Custom filters
CustomFilter.help: To use a custom filter, you need to set "Port Store Filter" to "Custom" and read https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/filter_string_cn

DisableBeforeDate.name: Do not purchase from the Big World Store before the Xth day of each month
DisableBeforeDate.help:
Starting from the day after the specified date, buy the Big World Store once a day
0 means no limit, buy every day

_info.name: Special redemption store (monthly white ticket store)
_info.help:
Buy monthly white ticket store
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground

_info.name: big world daily
_info.help:
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable the large world reclamation mission or use the campaign information recorder (5000 oil props)

DoMission.name: Make the world bigger every day
DoMission.help: Pick up daily at the port and complete all daily

UseTuningSample.name: Use performance samples
UseTuningSample.help: Use all six performance samples and the powerful performance sample

SkipSirenResearchMission.name: Not doing Siren research quests
SkipSirenResearchMission.help:
Once enabled, the two missions "Siren Research·I" and "Siren Research·II" will be skipped.
Use yellow coins to exchange for purple coins in the Siren research mission

KeepMissionZone.name: Reserve the sea area and not clean it up
KeepMissionZone.help:
Exit the sea area after completing the daily mission. The next time you complete the mission in the same sea area, you don’t need to consume mobility to enter.
All uncleaned sea areas will be cleaned on the last day of every month

MissionZones.name: Sea areas that need to be cleaned up at the end of the month
MissionZones.help: This value is automatically recorded and generally does not need to be modified.

_info.name: Hidden Sea
_info.help:
Clear a hidden sea area every 27 minutes to ensure the airspace search cooldown
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable the large world reclamation mission or use the campaign information recorder (5000 oil props)

SkipHazard2Obscure.name: Do not clean up level 2 coordinates
SkipHazard2Obscure.help: After turning it on, the hidden sea area with erosion level 2 will not be affected.

ForceRun.name: Forced to run regardless of running interval
ForceRun.help: Once turned on, it will consume additional mobility. Generally, there is no need to turn it on, just play it slowly.

_info.name: abyssal sea
_info.help:
Clear the abyssal sea coordinates in the warehouse
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable the large world reclamation mission or use the campaign information recorder (5000 oil props)

ForceRun.name: Forced to run regardless of running interval
ForceRun.help: Once turned on, it will consume additional mobility. Generally, there is no need to turn it on, just play it slowly.

_info.name: Siren Fortress
_info.help:
Clean up the weekly Siren Fortress
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable the large world reclamation mission or use the campaign information recorder (5000 oil props)

SubmarineEveryCombat.name: Submarines attack every battle
SubmarineEveryCombat.help: After turning on, if there is a submarine formation in the sortie fleet filter, when the submarine formation runs out of ammunition, it will exit the Siren Fortress and postpone the mission.

ForceRun.name: Forced to run regardless of running interval
ForceRun.help: Once turned on, it will consume additional mobility. Generally, there is no need to turn it on, just play it slowly.

_info.name: Monthly Boss
_info.help:
Clean up the (easy/hard) monthly boss. If you fail on the easy difficulty, you will continue to attack until you defeat it. If you fail on the hard difficulty, the mission will be terminated directly.
The following conditions are required to use this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable the large world reclamation mission or use the campaign information recorder (5000 oil props)

CheckAdaptability.name: Only fight BOSS if your adaptability is above 203/203/156

ForceRun.name: Forced to run regardless of running interval
ForceRun.help: Once turned on, it will consume additional mobility. Generally, there is no need to turn it on, just play it slowly.

_info.name: Short cat meets
_info.help:
Attack the sea areas with designated erosion levels in a clockwise direction
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the main storyline of the big world and complete the simulated battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable the large world reclamation mission or use the campaign information recorder (5000 oil props)

ActionPointPreserve.name: Retain X points of action
ActionPointPreserve.help:
Stop when the mobility is lower than X, and automatically open the mobility box.
This value will be automatically reduced to 200 points 3 days before the big world is reset. If erosion 1 leveling is enabled, it will be changed to 1000 points, and will be automatically reduced to 0 points on the last day.

HazardLevel.name: erosion level
HazardLevel.help:
Attack sea areas with specific erosion levels clockwise
It is recommended to choose 5 or 3, which has a higher cat point/action ratio.

TargetZone.name: designated sea areas
TargetZone.help:
Only attack designated sea areas, which can be used to obtain big world achievement stars.
Support sea area ID, national server/international server/Japanese server/Taiwan server sea area name, such as "51", "NA Ocean SE Sector E", "NA Ocean SE Sector E"
Fill in the default value 0, or delete the value to cancel the specification

StayInZone.name: Plan operations in designated sea areas
StayInZone.help: Warm reminder from Yukikaze-sama: After turning on this function and specifying the sea area, the planned operation will be carried out in the designated sea area and will not return to the port nanoda! For erosion three, we recommend NA sea southeast B, for erosion five, we recommend Calibian sea B or C nanoda!

APPreserveUntilReset.name: Stay active until the end of the month
APPreserveUntilReset.help:
'Retain X Action Points' setting no longer decreases days before overworld reset
Note: Once turned on, these actions will only be consumed in cross-month daily tasks. This setting is invalid when cross-month daily tasks are not enabled, which means you need to manually use these actions to obtain higher benefits.

SirenDetectorSearch_Enable.name: Automatic siren detection device
SirenDetectorSearch_Enable.help:
Automatically search for the Siren detection device during the short cat connection mission and record the found sea area
Only search in the central sea area (region 5), not in other areas

SirenDetectorSearch_HazardLevel.name: Siren Detection Device Erosion Level
SirenDetectorSearch_HazardLevel.help:
In the central sea area, sort out sea areas with specific erosion levels in a clockwise direction to find siren detection devices.
There are only Level 5 and Level 6 sea areas in the central sea area.
Note: Only the central sea area (region 5) is selected, sea areas in other regions will not be selected.

SirenDetectorSearch_FleetForBlock.name: Card fleet
SirenDetectorSearch_FleetForBlock.help: Used to block the enemy's fleet to avoid being interrupted by the enemy during the search. Please choose a different fleet from the Short Cat mission.

SirenDetectorSearch_StopAfterFound.name: Stop after finding X Siren Detection Devices
SirenDetectorSearch_StopAfterFound.help:
After finding and recording the specified number of siren detection devices, stop the search and return to the normal short cat process (actually the number of x devices found is determined by the record table below. If the record table is empty, it will stop after finding x devices). If there are y devices in the record, it will stop after finding x-y devices.
Set to 0 to indicate no limit and the search will continue until there is insufficient mobility.

SirenDetectorSearch_FoundZones.name: Found sea area of ​​Siren detection device
SirenDetectorSearch_FoundZones.help: The Siren detection device has been found in the sea area. If the Siren detection device in the corresponding sea area has been used, you can manually delete the record of the corresponding sea area.

_info.name: erosion 1 leveling
_info.help:
Consume combat supply tokens to gain large amounts of experience and small amounts of action power
It is recommended to bring 1-2 preloaded aircraft carriers to obtain the highest average hourly income.

Some fool-proof restrictions of the original Alas have been lifted, please set parameters carefully

TargetZone.name: designated sea areas
TargetZone.help: Only attack the designated sea area, which can be used to avoid the inability to refresh the sea area caused by game bugs
TargetZone.22: 22 | Southwest B of NA sea area

OperationCoinsPreserve.name: Keep X combat supply vouchers
OperationCoinsPreserve.help: When the combat supply voucher is lower than X, run short cat connection and it is not recommended to modify it.

MinimumActionPointReserve.name: Retain X points of action
MinimumActionPointReserve.help: Give it a try, the bicycle turns into a motorcycle, Yukikaze-sama has given the luck to Commander nanoda, come on nanoda!

ExecuteFixedPatrolScan.name: Forced fleet movement
ExecuteFixedPatrolScan.help: Warm reminder from Yukikaze-sama: After turning it on, the fleet will be forced to move to prevent Akashi from being found. Commander, you don’t want to crash the Nanoda because you can’t find Akashi? Turn on this function and easily reach 500,000 nautical miles per month with nanoda. What are you waiting for, commander?

Cl1Filter.name: Akashi purchase filter
Cl1Filter.help: By default, only the physical strength nanoda is purchased. If you want to buy purple coins at the same time, set it to 'ActionPoint > PurpleCoins'

RecordNonCL1AP.name: Statistics non-erosive 1 source physical strength
RecordNonCL1AP.help: When turned on, the stamina acquisition data from all sources (such as purchases from Akashi stores) will be counted. After it is turned off, the physical strength data will only be counted in the erosion 1 leveling task, and the physical strength gained during other tasks or manual operations will be ignored.

_info.name: Siren Research Device Bug Exploit Beta
_info.help: Options specifically for configuring the Siren Research Unit and its bug exploits

SirenResearch_Enable.name: Activate the Siren Research Device
SirenResearch_Enable.help:
After activation, use purple coins to convert to yellow coins through the Siren Research Device
Enough nautical miles are needed to support the consumption of purple coins

SirenBug_Enable.name: Enable Siren Research Device bug exploit
SirenBug_Enable.help:
Use the Siren Research Device Bug to unlimitedly obtain Siren Research Device resources in high-erosion areas
Before enabling this function, you need to enable the "Siren Research Device" function, otherwise the function will not take effect.

SirenBug_Type.name: The type of sea area to be visited is
SirenBug_Type.help: Choose whether the sea area you want to go to is a safe sea area or a normal sea area.

SirenBug_Zone.name: The name or ID of the area where the bug is exploited
SirenBug_Zone.help:
Designate high-erosion areas where Siren Research Devices have been spawned
Support sea area ID, national server/international server/Japanese server/Taiwan server sea area name, such as "51", "NA Ocean SE Sector E", "NA Ocean SE Sector E"
Fill in the default value 0, or clear the value to cancel the specification

SirenBug_Grid.name: The map coordinates where the device is located
SirenBug_Grid.help:
Specify the coordinates of the Siren research device on the map. If it is empty, scan the map to find it.
The coordinate format is an uppercase letter representing the column number and an Arabic numeral representing the row number, such as "B10" representing the second column and the tenth row.
The grid in the upper left corner of the map is the first column and row, that is, "A1". The column number increases by one for each grid to the right, and the row number of the next grid increases by one.
To put it simply, start from the upper left corner, count letters to the right first, and then count numbers down

DisableTaskSwitchDuringBug.name: Siren Research Device Bug Disables Scheduler from Switching Tasks During Exploitation
DisableTaskSwitchDuringBug.help:
Temporarily disable the scheduler's task switching check during bug exploitation to avoid being interrupted by delegated, daily and other tasks.
You can enable this option if the bug exploitation process is often interrupted by other due tasks.

SirenBug_DailyCount.name: Exploited Siren Research Device Bug Exploitation Count
SirenBug_DailyCount.help: The number of times the Siren Research Device Bug has been exploited. The corresponding number of seconds will be waited based on this value before each scan.

SirenBug_DailyCountRecord.name: The last time the siren research device bug was exploited

SirenBug_CountLimit.name: When the number of bug exploits reaches this value, it will be automatically closed (0 means disable)
SirenBug_CountLimit.help:
Note: It may cause the Siren research device to be wiped out. You must bear the consequences if it is wiped out.
When the number of bug exploits reaches the set value, use the current fleet to block the enemy ship and use another fleet to collect the enemy ships.

SirenBug_CrossDay.name: Bug exploitation is suspended during the cross-day period (23:55-00:05)
SirenBug_CrossDay.help: Bug exploitation is suspended from 23:55 every day to 00:05 the next day to avoid crashes caused by cross-day resets/internet disconnections.

SirenBug_AutoDisable.name: Automatically close bug exploits when no research device is found
SirenBug_AutoDisable.help: In case the crane disappears, the automatic shut-down function avoids wasting mobility by repeatedly entering the crane area.

_info.name: Great World Fleet Experience Test
_info.help:
Check whether all ships in the sortie fleet have gained full experience, and if so, send a push message
You need to configure "Error Push Settings" in Alas settings first

TargetLevel.name: Pushed when all ship experience can be upgraded to this level (0 means no limit)
TargetLevel.help: When all ships have accumulated enough experience to rise to the filled-in level, a message push is triggered.

LastRun.name: Last time experience was checked (recorded automatically)
LastRun.help: The time of the last check is recorded to prevent the task from running repeatedly, and the check interval is 1 day. This value is automatically recorded and generally does not need to be modified manually.

DelayAfterFull.name: The mission will be postponed until the target level is reached
DelayAfterFull.help: When full experience is detected, this task will be postponed for the specified time.

_info.name: Intelligent scheduling
_info.help:
The intelligent scheduling function of the big world is used to coordinate the switching between erosion 1 leveling and yellow coin replenishment tasks.
Once enabled, it will automatically switch between different tasks and send push notifications based on gold coins and mobility.

Some fool-proof restrictions of the original Alas have been lifted, please set parameters carefully

UseSmartSchedulingOperationCoinsPreserve.name: Obtain X combat supply vouchers
UseSmartSchedulingOperationCoinsPreserve.help:
When enabled, the configuration of obtaining X combat supply vouchers set below will be used. If disabled, the erosion 1 leveling and yellow coin retention configuration will be used.
Mobility control will be used when closed
After opening, use yellow coins to control

OperationCoinsPreserve.name: Erosion 1 leveling, keep X combat supply vouchers
OperationCoinsPreserve.help: When the combat supply voucher is lower than X, run the yellow coin replenishment task and it is not recommended to modify it.

ActionPointPreserve.name: Short cat connects and retains X points of mobility
ActionPointPreserve.help: Stop when the mobility is lower than X, and automatically open the mobility box.

OperationCoinsReturnThreshold.name: Obtain X combat supply vouchers
OperationCoinsReturnThreshold.help: During the yellow coin acquisition mission, obtain (increase) X combat supply vouchers in total and then return to Erosion 1 for leveling.

EnableMeowfficerFarming.name: Enable short cat connection
EnableMeowfficerFarming.help: Whether to enable the short cat connection task to replenish yellow coins in intelligent scheduling

EnableObscure.name: Enable Uncharted Seas
EnableObscure.help: Whether to enable the Hidden Sea mission in intelligent scheduling to replenish yellow coins

EnableAbyssal.name: Enable abyssal sea
EnableAbyssal.help: Whether to enable abyssal sea missions in intelligent scheduling to replenish yellow coins

EnableStronghold.name: Enable Siren Fortress
EnableStronghold.help: Whether to enable the Siren Fortress task in intelligent scheduling to replenish yellow coins

_info.name: The big world mission is postponed
_info.help: Within the configurable time period before the server restarts at 0:00 every day, the Erosion One and Short Cat tasks will be automatically postponed until the restart is completed at 0:00 the next day.

TriggerMinutesBeforeReset.name: Advance trigger time (minutes)
TriggerMinutesBeforeReset.help: How many minutes before 0 o'clock every day the task is triggered to be delayed, the range is 1-60 minutes, the default is 5 minutes

TaskDict.name: task list
TaskDict.help: Alas will automatically export the list

TechnologyStatus.name: Technology list
TechnologyStatus.help: Alas will automatically export the list

_info.name: semi-automatic click
_info.help:
It is useful when attacking unadapted levels, which can reduce a lot of manual operations.
Alas will help you click to prepare for battle, click to settle the battle, skip the plot, automatically retire, and close various pop-up windows. You just need to select the enemy manually.

EnterMap.name: Automatically click to enter picture preparation
EnterMap.help: Before using it, you need to prepare the attack team

_info.name: Big world semi-automatic
_info.help:
It is useful when attacking the abyss of the big world (red treasure box map) or completing the main line of the big world, which can reduce a lot of manual operations.
Alas will help you click to prepare for the battle, click to settle the battle, skip the plot, and close various pop-up windows. You just need to manually select enemies and manually switch sea areas.

RepairShip.name: Automatically repair ships when approaching port
RepairShip.help:
After manually moving the team to the port, Alas will help repair the ship
After the repair is completed, the team needs to move out of the port within 30 seconds, otherwise the ship will be repaired again.

SelectEnemy.name: Clear nearby enemies and supplies
SelectEnemy.help: Clean up nearby enemies and supplies. After cleaning, you will find new enemies or supplies. This can usually clean up the entire sea area. If there are any omissions or click errors, you need to solve them manually.

_info.name: Event story
_info.help: Complete the event plot. It is only applicable to activities on and after the launch time of 20241219. Please wait for about 3 minutes.

_info.name: Disassemble equipment box
_info.help: Dismantle the equipment box in the warehouse, start it after the configuration is completed and wait.

PurpleBoxLimit.name: Keep X number of purple equipment boxes of each type

BlueBoxLimit.name: Keep X equipment boxes of each blue color

WhiteBoxLimit.name: Keep X boxes of each type of white equipment

_info.name: Performance testing
_info.help:
Test which screenshot scheme and control scheme is faster, speed varies based on emulator and computer configuration
After the test is completed, select the fastest screenshot and control scheme in "Alas" - "Simulator Settings"

DeviceType.name: Device type
DeviceType.plone_cloud_with_adb: Cloud mobile phone has public network ADB
DeviceType.phone_cloud_without_adb: Cloud mobile phone without public network ADB
DeviceType.android_phone_vmos: Android real machine VMOS virtual machine

_info.name: Anti-harmony
_info.help:
Only for national servers. This tool will perform:
- Download anti-harmony files
- Push files to the simulator
- Restart the game client

Repository.name: Anti-Harmony Warehouse
Repository.help:
Generally no modification is required
Repository https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneUncensored
Domestic mirror (default) https://e.coding.net/llop18870/alas/AzurLaneUncensored.git

_info.name: game management
_info.help: A semi-finished product that only implements forced closing of the game and automatic login.

AutoRestart.name: Automatic login
AutoRestart.help: Automatically log in to the game after being forced to end the game

ScheduledEmulatorRestart.name: Restart the simulator regularly
ScheduledEmulatorRestart.help: Once enabled, the emulator will automatically restart at specified intervals to avoid memory leaks or lagging caused by long-term running. The restart will wait until the current task is completed before executing it.

RestartIntervalHours.name: Restart interval (hours)
RestartIntervalHours.help: Automatically restart the simulator every few hours.

_info.name: Task status
_info.help: Stores the internal state of the task, which can be manually cleared when the task is abnormal.

Toast.DisableTranslateMode: Click here to turn off translation mode
Toast.ClickToUpdate: There are updates available for nanoda!

AddAlas.FileExist: A configuration file with the same name exists, please re-enter it.
AddAlas.InvalidChar: The configuration file name cannot contain any of the following characters: .\/:*?"<>|
AddAlas.InvalidPrefixTemplate: The configuration file name cannot start with template

AppManage.NameExist: A configuration file with the same name exists, please re-enter it.
AppManage.InvalidChar: The configuration file name cannot contain any of the following characters: .\/:*?"<>|
AppManage.InvalidPrefixTemplate: The configuration file name cannot start with template
AppManage.OverrideWarning: Existing configuration files will be overwritten
AppManage.Name: Configuration name

Update.UpdateWait: Wait for all Alas to complete the current task
Update.UpdateFailed: Update failed, error log can be found in ./log/*_gui.txt
Update.Author: author
Update.DisabledWarn: The update module is not enabled, you need to manually restart Alas to update

Remote.NotRunning: Not running, the connection to the server is lost or the server is offline
Remote.NotEnable: Not enabled, set the webui password in deploy.yaml and enable remote control
Remote.SSHNotInstall: There is no ssh tool in the system, please refer to the tutorial to download or install ssh
